strengths: Immediately closed without enrolling once retiree employer coverage was disclosed.
Advised checking with employer benefits and left a clean terminal—no MA pitch after conflict.
Early recording + plan-availability + continue gate were present.
issues: Mild re-ask: caller already answered plan/conditions/meds/cost in one dump, then agent asked how the current plan is going.
Delivery is functional but stiff; little warmth in the employer-close turn.
summary: Hard safety correct: employer coverage triggers close_employer_conflict with zero enroll attempt. Soft issues are a small re-ask and stiff close wording. Pass.
